sqlMap.insert:
insert into PayLog (AppId, OrderId, Amount,PlatformFee, Type, Status,Status1, CreateTime,PayTime, CreateDay,PayDay) values (#appId#, #orderId#, #amount#,#platformFee#, #type#, #status#,#status1#, #createTime#,#payTime#, #createDay#,#payDay#)
select LAST_INSERT_ID() as id
sqlMap.update: update paylog set Status=1, Status1=1, Description=#description#, PayTime = date_add(now(), interval 150 minute), PayDay=#payDay#, ValidDay=#validDay# where Id = #id# and Status = 0
update PayLog set rastreo = #rastreo# where Id = #id#
sqlMap.select: select * from paylog where PayTypeId = 70 and Status = 1 and AppId = 10087 and NotifyData != '' and NotifyData NOT LIKE CONCAT('%', Amount * 0.01, '%')
select * from paylog where OrderId = #orderId# order by Id desc

SELECT id, appid, orderid, amount, type, callbackurl, notifyurl, STATUS, createtime, paytime, synccnt, platformfee, PayTypeId, createday, payday, currency, cardholder, email, mobile, Ip, description, validday, validstatus, country, clabe, rastreo FROM paylog WHERE 1 =1
AppId = #appId#
Id = #id#
OrderId like concat('%', #orderId#, '%')
Amount = #amount#
Type = #type#
((SyncCnt >0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#) OR (SyncCnt = 0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#) OR (SyncCnt < 0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#))
Status = #status#
clabe like concat('%', #clabe#, '%')
rastreo like concat('%', #rastreo#, '%')
CreateTime >= #startCreateTime#
CreateTime <= #endCreateTime#
PayTime >= #startPayTime#
PayTime <= #endPayTime#
order by CreateTime desc
limit $rowIndex$,$limit$

SELECT ifnull( sum( Amount ), 0 ) AS needPayAmount, SUM( IF ( `Status` = 1, Amount, 0 )) AS payAmount, SUM( IF ( `Status` = 1, PlatformFee, 0 )) AS payFee, COUNT( IF ( `Status` = 1, Id, NULL )) AS payNum, count(*) AS allPayNum FROM paylog WHERE 1 = 1
AppId = #appId#
Id = #id#
OrderId like concat('%', #orderId#, '%')
Amount = #amount#
Type = #type#
((SyncCnt >0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#) OR (SyncCnt = 0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#) OR (SyncCnt < 0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#))
Status = #status#
clabe like concat('%', #clabe#, '%')
rastreo like concat('%', #rastreo#, '%')
CreateTime >= #startCreateTime#
CreateTime <= #endCreateTime#
PayTime >= #startPayTime#
PayTime <= #endPayTime#
order by CreateTime desc

SELECT SELECT ifnull( sum( Amount ), 0 ) AS needPayAmount, SUM( IF ( `Status` = 1, Amount, 0 )) AS payAmount, SUM( IF ( `Status` = 1, PlatformFee, 0 )) AS payFee, COUNT( IF ( `Status` = 1, Id, NULL )) AS payNum, count(*) AS allPayNum FROM paylog WHERE 1 = 1
AppId = #appId#
Id = #id#
OrderId like concat('%', #orderId#, '%')
Amount = #amount#
Type = #type#
((SyncCnt >0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#) OR (SyncCnt = 0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#) OR (SyncCnt < 0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#))
Status = #status#
clabe like concat('%', #clabe#, '%')
CreateTime >= #startCreateTime#
CreateTime <= #endCreateTime#
PayTime >= #startPayTime#
PayTime <= #endPayTime#
order by CreateTime desc

SELECT p.id, appid, orderid, amount, p.STATUS, p.createtime, paytime, platformfee, Ip, p.country FROM paylog p left join paytype pt on p.PayTypeId = pt.Id WHERE 1 =1
AppId = #appId#
p.Id = #id#
OrderId like concat('%', #orderId#, '%')
((SyncCnt >0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#) OR (SyncCnt = 0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#) OR (SyncCnt < 0 AND SyncCnt = #syncCnt#))
p.Status = #status#
clabe like concat('%', #clabe#, '%')
p.CreateTime >= #startCreateTime#
p.CreateTime <= #endCreateTime#
p.CreateTime >= #startPayTime#
p.CreateTime <= #endPayTime#
